title: Alexandru Proca
body: Alexandru Proca (16 October 1897 – 13 December 1955) was a Romanian physicist who studied and worked in France. He developed the vector meson theory of nuclear forces and the relativistic quantum field equations that bear his name (Proca's equations) for the massive, vector spin-1 mesons.
categories: Members of the Romanian Academy elected posthumously
Members of the Romanian Academy of Sciences
